action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 successfully trained a Ridge regression model (sklearn) on cached regional embeddings + PLLD features. It selected full 643-dim features with alpha=39.07, achieving val_spr=0.83508, and saved the model to checkpoints/sklearn_model.pt. No eval was submitted yet. Analysis: The sklearn Ridge model may generalize better than the SGD-trained torch linear model due to exact L2 regularization optimization. I need to submit eval immediately to test the test spearman. Before submitting, I'll quickly verify predict.py syntax and that the sklearn checkpoint loads correctly. Decision: Run a fast validation command, then submit eval with the sklearn checkpoint.
action.command: python -m py_compile predict.py && python -c "import torch; c=torch.load('checkpoints/sklearn_model.pt', weights_only=False); print('predict.py OK, sklearn model:', c['feature_set'], c['alpha'])"
